case_title: CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC VS. VERN MASON ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC SERVED AUG-28-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MASON, VERN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASON, VERN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 64 TURK STREET #403, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SAN FRANCISCO, ***THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
